diagram_notes: Blueprint of a shed showing a composite shape with two shaded regions (top rectangle 20x12 ft = 240 sq ft, and top right triangle with legs 9 ft and 12 ft, hypotenuse 15 ft = area 54 sq ft; shaded total = 294 sq ft) and two unshaded regions (bottom rectangle 20x14 = 280 ft and bottom right rectangle 9x14 = 126 sq ft; unshaded = 406 sq ft). Total surface area includes all faces.
